findings.description: `UploadHelper` is listed in the hints for section s4 (アップロードファイルを読み込む方法), but `UploadHelper` does not appear anywhere in the corresponding source section. That section only uses `PartInfo`, `getInputStream()`, and `InputStream`. Including `UploadHelper` as a hint for s4 has no basis in the source and could mislead routing.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4 section: `PartInfo partInfo = req.getPart("imageFile").get(0); InputStream in = partInfo.getInputStream();` — no UploadHelper reference.
